Global middleware without any route creates a router but no HTTP server: the
server is generated from routes, not from a bare router.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http:middleware
func Logged(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/web"
)

func run() error {
	// Providers
	r := router.New()

	// Middleware
	r.Use(web.Logged)
	return nil
}
